content: DLPack = open in-memory tensor struct for zero-copy framework exchange (device type, dtype, ndim, shape, strides, byte offset). __cuda_array_interface__ = NVIDIA/Numba de-facto GPU pointer protocol. Both are the standard zero-copy paths; CuPy/PyTorch/Numba/cuDF all support from_dlpack/toDlpack and CAI. For numpy host arrays use rust-numpy (PyO3 ecosystem). Expose GPU buffers via __cuda_array_interface__ dict + DLPack capsule.
